blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and edges are well-defined.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background.

glare_identification.description: No glare or overexposed regions detected.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration observed.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds detected.

cut_off_detection.description: No cut-off edges or excluded document portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete content.

obstructions.description: No obstructions or elements blocking the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, item description/line items, and payment method. It is a fiscal receipt from a shop indicating a completed transaction for food items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document. The fields found include supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, item description/line items, and payment method.

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services

issues.description: Missing mandatory invoice number on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show the date when the purchase/transaction occurred

issues.description: Meal expenses are not tax exempt and will be grossed up
issues.recommendation: Meal expenses are not tax exempt and will be grossed up. Any amount exceeding the government-set per diem rate will be subject to tax.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Domestic travel: The current rate is 45 PLN per day. Duration of Trip up to 8 hours = 0%, between 8 – 12 hours 50%, More than 12 hours 100%. It is possible to increase the daily per diem rate. However, any portion of the per diem amount that exceeds the set Government rate will be taxable

issues.description: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses
issues.recommendation: Please submit the actual tax receipt or invoice for this expense. Online copies are sufficient.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing mandatory customer name and invoice number. Meal expenses are subject to gross-up as they are not tax exempt. Additional documentation in the form of actual tax receipts or invoices is required.
